description: Handler-level behavior contract: argument validation and the HTTP request the handler builds. Both language runners replay these cases against the real dispatch path with the HTTP transport faked; no network, no credentials.

cases.name: rejects non-positive entity ids
cases.expect_error: entity_ids must be a non-empty array of positive integers

cases.name: rejects missing entity ids
cases.expect_error: entity_ids must be a non-empty array of positive integers

cases.name: rejects string entity ids
cases.expect_error: entity_ids must be a non-empty array of positive integers

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This creates a monitor service token. Set confirm=true to proceed.
